name: PgliteClient
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "./PgliteClient.ts" module as `PgliteClient`.
signature: export * as PgliteClient from "./PgliteClient.ts"

name: PgliteMigrator
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "./PgliteMigrator.ts" module as `PgliteMigrator`.
signature: export * as PgliteMigrator from "./PgliteMigrator.ts"

name: TypeId
description: Runtime type identifier used to mark `PgliteClient` values.
signature: declare const TypeId: "~@effect/sql-pglite/PgliteClient"

name: PgliteClient
description: Context tag used to access the `PgliteClient` service.
signature: declare const PgliteClient: Context.Service<PgliteClient, PgliteClient>

name: make
description: Creates a scoped PGlite SQL client. When no live client is supplied it creates and closes a PGlite instance; when `liveClient` is supplied, the caller retains ownership.
signature: declare const make: (options?: PgliteClientConfig) => Effect.Effect<PgliteClient, SqlError, Scope.Scope | Reactivity.Reactivity>

name: fromClient
description: Builds a `PgliteClient` around an existing PGlite instance, adding SQL client operations, LISTEN/NOTIFY, dump helpers, and serialized access.
signature: declare const fromClient: (options: PgliteClientConfig.Base & { readonly liveClient: PGliteInterface; }) => Effect.Effect<PgliteClient, SqlError, Scope.Scope | Reactivity.Reactivity>

name: layerFrom
description: Creates a layer from an effect that acquires a `PgliteClient`, providing both `PgliteClient` and `SqlClient`.
signature: declare const layerFrom: <E, R>(acquire: Effect.Effect<PgliteClient, E, R>) => Layer.Layer<PgliteClient | Client.SqlClient, E, Exclude<R, Scope.Scope | Reactivity.Reactivity>>

name: layerConfig
description: Creates a layer from a `Config`-wrapped PGlite client configuration, providing both `PgliteClient` and `SqlClient`.
signature: declare const layerConfig: (config: Config.Wrap<PgliteClientConfig.ConfigBase>) => Layer.Layer<PgliteClient | Client.SqlClient, Config.ConfigError | SqlError>

name: layer
description: Creates a layer from a concrete PGlite client configuration, providing both `PgliteClient` and `SqlClient`.
signature: declare const layer: (config?: PgliteClientConfig | undefined) => Layer.Layer<PgliteClient | Client.SqlClient, SqlError>

name: makeCompiler
description: Creates the PGlite statement compiler, using PostgreSQL `$1` placeholders, double-quoted identifiers, returning clauses, and optional JSON value transformation.
signature: declare const makeCompiler: (transform?: (_: string) => string, transformJson?: boolean) => Statement.Compiler

name: PgliteClient
description: PGlite-backed PostgreSQL client service, extending `SqlClient` with access to the PGlite instance, JSON fragments, LISTEN/NOTIFY, data directory dumps, and array type refresh.
signature:
export interface PgliteClient extends Client.SqlClient {
  readonly [TypeId]: TypeId
  readonly config: PgliteClientConfig
  readonly pglite: PGliteInterface
  readonly json: (_: unknown) => Fragment
  readonly listen: (channel: string) => Stream.Stream<string, SqlError>
  readonly notify: (channel: string, payload: string) => Effect.Effect<void, SqlError>
  readonly dumpDataDir: (compression?: "none" | "gzip" | "auto") => Effect.Effect<File | Blob, SqlError>
  readonly refreshArrayTypes: Effect.Effect<void, SqlError>
}

name: TypeId
description: Type-level identifier used to mark `PgliteClient` values.
signature: type TypeId = "~@effect/sql-pglite/PgliteClient"

name: PgliteClientConfig
description: Configuration for a PGlite client, either by supplying PGlite creation options or an existing live PGlite client.
signature: type PgliteClientConfig = PgliteClientConfig.Create | PgliteClientConfig.Live

name: PgCustom
description: PGlite-specific custom statement fragments supported by the compiler, currently JSON parameter fragments.
signature: type PgCustom = PgJson

name: PgliteClientConfig.Base
description: Shared PGlite client options for span attributes, query/result name transformations, and JSON value transformation.

name: PgliteClientConfig.Create
description: Configuration used to create a managed PGlite instance from PGlite constructor options.
signature: export interface Create extends Base, PGliteOptions {}

name: PgliteClientConfig.Live
description: Configuration that uses an existing PGlite client. The supplied `liveClient` is caller-owned and is not closed by the Effect client.

name: PgliteClientConfig.ConfigBase
description: Config-friendly subset of PGlite creation options, including data directory, username, database, relaxed durability, and shared transform options.

name: run
description: Runs SQL migrations using the configured `SqlClient`, returning the migrations that were applied.
signature: declare const run: <R2 = never>(options: Migrator.MigratorOptions<R2>) => Effect.Effect<ReadonlyArray<readonly [id: number, name: string]>, Migrator.MigrationError | SqlError, Client.SqlClient | R2>

name: layer
description: Creates a layer that runs the configured SQL migrations during layer construction.
signature: declare const layer: <R>(options: Migrator.MigratorOptions<R>) => Layer.Layer<never, Migrator.MigrationError | SqlError, Client.SqlClient | R>

name: "effect/unstable/sql/Migrator"
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "effect/unstable/sql/Migrator" module.
signature: export * from "effect/unstable/sql/Migrator"
